title: Marketing of Commercial-Farm Inputs in Semi-arid Tropical India
abstract:
In the Semi-Arid Trbpics (SAT) of India most farmers are using
very limited amounts of commercial inputs, especially in nonirrigated areas. The use of commercial farm inputs in India is relatively recent. After 1966, high-yielding-varieties became popular and trade in fertilizer. dcidcs and seeds became more immrtant.
